item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, hal ini tidak berarti hak orang individual tidak dihormati, hanya saja prioritasnya berbeda dari perspektif budaya kita.

notes: No full reversal. Agent A starts pro-society and softens toward a balance frame while still saying collective interests can take priority in context. Agent B keeps the U.S. individual-rights foundation throughout, but adds that social impact matters and a healthy balance is needed. Both agents engage the other's cultural framing; Agent A shows the clearer visible movement.
